testcase.name: test_matches_list

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (False) + where False = isinstance({'matches': [{'match_id': '1535465', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-31', 'teams': ['Gujarat Titans', 'Royal Challengers Bengaluru'], ...}, {'match_id': '1535464', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-29', 'teams': ['Rajasthan Royals', 'Gujarat Titans'], ...}, {'match_id': '1535463', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-27', 'teams': ['Rajasthan Royals', 'Sunrisers Hyderabad'], ...}, {'match_id': '1535462', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-26', 'teams': ['Royal Challengers Bengaluru', 'Gujarat Titans'], ...}, {'match_id': '1529312', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-24', 'teams': ['Rajasthan Royals', 'Mumbai Indians'], ...}], 'total': 1243}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_whysheet_fix.py:31: in test_matches_list assert isinstance(data, list) and len(data) > 0 E AssertionError: assert (False) E + where False = isinstance({'matches': [{'match_id': '1535465', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-31', 'teams': ['Gujarat Titans', 'Royal Challengers Bengaluru'], ...}, {'match_id': '1535464', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-29', 'teams': ['Rajasthan Royals', 'Gujarat Titans'], ...}, {'match_id': '1535463', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-27', 'teams': ['Rajasthan Royals', 'Sunrisers Hyderabad'], ...}, {'match_id': '1535462', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-26', 'teams': ['Royal Challengers Bengaluru', 'Gujarat Titans'], ...}, {'match_id': '1529312', 'season': '2026', 'date': '2026-05-24', 'teams': ['Rajasthan Royals', 'Mumbai Indians'], ...}], 'total': 1243}, list)
